Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Maiko, are you okay? You're not hurt anywhere?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Why would you do such a thing!? I was worried sick![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Do you think that's funny, giving me a heart attack like that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Um... You made me worry too! I was so scared...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You said you were getting a divorce, and I didn't know what to do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 64 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I... I don't want you to get divorced![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Oh, so that's what this is all about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}We're really sorry, Maiko... Why don't we go home and talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}It's awful we pulled you into this... I'm not sure what else to say...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hey... I told you to keep it a secret...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko seems relieved to see[n]that her parents care about her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko went home with her parents,[n]so I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
